title: FCpack Optimized
description: Simplify your life and increase your performance with this simple modpack.
body:
# Works everywhere

FCpack Optimized has no content mods, so it works on any world or server. Modpack

This modpack is designed to facilitate different aspects of the game, as well as to optimize your client

# Sodium

This build is based on the optimizing mod sodium and all its adjuncts such as soduim extra, iris and so on



![This is an image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sDNKrhPN/images/3085ac2f9c934cd05eddcb61ce8ea0cecd87bea8.jpeg)
